description_long: This is a freestanding advertising board with a rectangular, vertically oriented display surface mounted on a single central pole and a square base. The main face features Japanese text and a colorful logo at the top, suggesting it advertises a restaurant named 'Akashia' and highlights a specialty dish. The board is primarily white with black and red accents, and the text is clearly printed in bold fonts for visibility. The base appears to be metallic and is set on a circular platform that mimics a tiled or paved sidewalk. The sides and back of the board are plain and metallic, lacking any additional signage or decoration. The overall construction suggests durability for outdoor urban environments, with a hard, smooth surface finish.
description: A freestanding, rectangular advertising board with Japanese restaurant signage, mounted on a metal base and designed for outdoor urban use. The front displays bold text and a colorful logo, while the sides and back are plain and metallic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main advertising face with Japanese text, a colorful logo, and clear restaurant branding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, metallic side panel and the thickness of the board, with no visible signage.
description_view_2: Another front view similar to view 0, highlighting the display surface and base from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain metallic back and the supporting pole, with no visible graphics or text.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding on a central pole with a square base
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness metal frame with squared corners
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed signage for a Japanese restaurant, featuring text and a logo
